loop1.note: Showing monthly energy totals and progress — energy targets and subsidy limits are not configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy delta — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; lossPct and efficiencyPct are derived from total power.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load as % of rated capacity; dip/surge event counts are approximated via AI summary as dedicated event counters are not available in the basket.
